welcome.body:
A keyboard. A dream. Every keystroke = Lines of Code.
Type to fill the code queue. Execute to earn $$$.

tech_tree.body:
Tech tree unlocked! Research upgrades with cash and LoC.
Run `cd tech-tree && ls` to browse nodes.

sidebar.body:
File explorer unlocked! Browse and buy upgrades by tier.
Run `ls upgrades/` to see what's available.

execution.body:
type → queue → execute → $$$
Code piles up. FLOPS burn through it. Cash flows.

first_purchase.body: First upgrade purchased! Check your stats with `status`.

first_tier.body:
New tier reached! More upgrades, more power.
Run `ls upgrades/` to see what's new.

ai_lab.body:
The age of writing code is over.

Your workers now produce tokens.
The atomic units AI models consume to generate LoC at massive scale.

Split your compute: FLOPS execute queued code into cash, or power AI models to generate more code.

spotlight_editor_body:
Software engineers make it look hard. It's really easy. Type anywhere in agi.py.
Each keystroke generates Lines of Code.
spotlight_stats_unlock_body: You've got code piling up. Unlock the Execute panel to run it and turn LoC into cash.
spotlight_execute_body: Hit Execute to process your queued Lines of Code. More FLOPS = more throughput = more cash.
